title: Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) RdRp nested RT-PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3l2pp","text":"A nested RT-PCR targeting the RdRp region of the sub-genus Sarbecovirus. The primers are modified from the pan-coronavirus RT-PCR published by Hu et al. 2017 to be more specific to SARS-CoV-2, though other coronaviruses may still be detected. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":59,"length":12},{"style":"italic","offset":145,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"derh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2ee6r","text":"Assay may be used in resource poor settings where real-time cyclers are not available.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6nt1d","text":"Sanger sequencing should be used to confirm SARS-CoV-2 where WGS is not available or where WGS fails due to poor quality sample.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"drjbh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ak3nr","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: %s %s Name Round 1 amplified products will produce a band of 605bp. Round 2 amplified products will produce a band of 440bp.

SuperScript III One-Step RT-PCR System with Platinum Taq Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #12574026 MyFi Mix Bioline Catalog #BIO-25049 Round 1 mix %s %s Dispense mix in 15µl amounts in 0.2ml PCR tubes suitable for thermocycler. Mix maybe stored frozen if necessary. Round 2 mix %s %s Dispense mix in 15µl amounts in 0.2ml PCR tubes suitable for thermocycler. Mix maybe stored frozen if necessary.

Thaw required number of tubes with round 1 mix. Add 5µl of extract, control, or NTC (nuclease-free water) to round 1 mix above for a final reaction volume of 20µl. Label the tubes and record details. The assay has been used with Eppendorf thermocyclers. PCR cycling times %s %s

Dilute each of the round 1 amplicons 1/100 in nuclease-free water ( 2ul + 198ul is ideal) Thaw required number of tubes with round 2 mix. Add 5μl of the diluted round 1 amplicon. Total reaction volume is 20μl. PCR cycling times %s %s

Amplified products are analysed by gel electrophoresis or equipment such as a QIAxcel or equivalent. Round 1 amplified products will produce a band of 605bp. Round 2 amplified products will produce a band of 440bp. No template controls (NTC) should be not detected. Example of result from a QIAxcel. D3-Round 1 band, D8-round 2 band, D4 and D9 are NTC in round 1 and 2 respectively.
creator: Judy A Northill
